lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just curious as to what you do around here.

lines.speaker: Sigismund
lines.text: I protect other travellers from monsters, both animal and human kind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Human? Can't say I've seen many human shaped monsters in the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Sigismund
lines.text: When you've been in the Wilderness as long as I have, you learn that not all monsters show themselves on the outside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhm... alright then, I'll leave you to your duties.

lines.speaker: Sigismund
lines.text: Watch yourself out there, it can be hard to tell friend from foe in these lands.

lines.speaker: Sigismund
lines.text: Well done! I have new information to share with you.
